div.style: color: rgb(148, 163, 184) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MessageQueue — ring buffer cap=256
Backpressure: oldest overwritten under load
Prevents queue growth under sustained high traffic

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BatchProcessor
Group by symbol:channel
Tag strategy (enforcement is caller's job)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Domain Engine
apply(msg) — in-place mutation of Map
No per-message allocation

Publisher
dirty: Set‹symbol›

(150 ms for ticker)
dirty.size > 0?

engine.snapshot(symbol)
new immutable slice — callers get stable ref

= buildViewModel()

span.p:

new Map(prev) — one atomic write
All dirty symbols in single reference swap

flash CSS class if |Δsize| > 10%
